title: neumannia theiformis
intro: Neumannia theiformis, also known as the "false orache," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the balsam family. The medicinal properties of Neumannia theiformis include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote digestion. Neumannia theiformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to address various health issues.
